creator: jsc@ntu.edu.tw
text:
I did two tests today.
The OS was installed on VM using snapshot ISO with default config.
The freetds was installed by pkg, version is 1.3.9,1.

1. freebsd-13.0-stable (installed using 2022/01 snapshot)
   openssl version 1.1.1m (14 Dec 2021)
   doesn't work. can not connect to ms sql server 2019.

2. freebsd-13.0-stable (installed using 2021/08 snapshot)
   openssl version 1.1.1k (25 Mar 2021)
   works normally.
